briefdescription.para: This function sets and initializes AES in ECB mode.

parameterdescription.para: Key Source for decryption of the data
Size of the AES key to be used for decryption: XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_128 for 128 bit key size or XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_256 for 256 bit key size

briefdescription.para: This function sets AES ECB mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Aes *InstancePtr, u64 KeyAddr, XSecure_AesKeySize KeySize, u64 InDataAddr, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesEcbDecrypt

briefdescription.para: This function writes AES key into XSECURE_AES_USER_KEY_7 and decrypts the data in ECB mode.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the key to be programmed in XSECURE_AES_USER_KEY_7
Size of the AES key to be used for decryption: XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_128 for 128 bit key size or XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_256 for 256 bit key size
Address of the encrypted data which needs to be decrypted
Address of output buffer where the decrypted data to be updated
Size of data to be decrypted in bytes. Data shall be 16 byte aligned for non-last chunks and 4 byte aligned when it is the last chunk

listitem.para: Validate input arguments and write AES key
Validate and put AES in ECB and decryption mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Aes *InstancePtr, u8 *EphAesKey, XSecure_AesKeySize KeySize, u8 *AesWrapKey, u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesKeyUnwrap

briefdescription.para: This function unwraps the given AES wrapped key.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the key to be programmed in XSECURE_AES_USER_KEY_7
Size of the AES key to be used for decryption: XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_128 for 128 bit key size or XSECURE_AES_KEY_SIZE_256 for 256 bit key size
Address of the wrapped key which needs to be decrypted
Address of output buffer where the decrypted data to be updated
Size of data to be decrypted in bytes. Data shall be 16 byte aligned for non-last chunks and 4 byte aligned when it is the last chunk

listitem.para: XSECURE_ERR_AES_KEY_SIZE_NOT_SUPPORTED - If AES key size is invalid.
XSECURE_ERR_AES_KEY_UNWRAP_FAILED_ERROR - If key unwrap is failed.
Validate input arguments and write AES key
XOR initial value with Round value
Validate and put AES in ECB and decryption mode
Loop counter mismatch indicates potential fault injection attack

briefdescription.para: This file contains Versal Net specific code for Xilsecure aes server.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.2 kpt 06/20/23 Initial release 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings. kpt 06/13/24 Added AES key unwrap with padding support. 5.6 tus 10/10/25 Move XSecure_AesEcbDecryptInit() inside the unwrap loop to properly initialise AES state before each independent ECB decrypt operation 5.7 tbk 03/30/26 Add Control Flow Integrity protection to XSecure_AesKeyUnwrap
